sections.paragraph:
verb לנוח

to rest, take a rest, lie down, repose; stay

verb להניח (>>הִנִּיחַ)

to put, place, lay; assume; coin (a term)

verb להנחות

to guide, lead, direct, instruct

verb הונח (>>הוּנַח)

be left alone, be given rest

verb הונחה

be guided, led, directed, instructed

adjective

silent (grammar)

noun

Noah (first name)

adjective

resting, incumbent, quiescent
